name: VibroSense Envelope Detectors (5 channels)
description: OTA-based precision rectifier + Gm-C LPF (fc=10Hz) per channel. Produces DC voltage proportional to RMS energy in each BPF band. Full-wave rectification.
margin_rule: All 5 channels must pass. Test with behavioral BPF output.

output_ripple_pct.description: Ripple on DC output relative to DC level
